query:
-- Insert videoCredits record for all existing users with 2 free credits
INSERT INTO videoCredits (userId, balance, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 2, NOW(), NOW()
FROM users
WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT userId FROM videoCredits);

-- Record the free grant transaction for each user
INSERT INTO videoCreditTransactions (userId, type, amount, balanceAfter, description, createdAt)
SELECT id, 'free_grant', 2, 2, 'Welcome bonus: 2 free video credits', NOW()
FROM users
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT userId FROM videoCreditTransactions WHERE type = 'free_grant' AND description LIKE 'Welcome bonus%'
);
